> Input: Add a Contact Us form with name, email, and message fields
> Design brief is ready. Summary:
> - Components: 1
> - States covered: 5
> - Microcopy entries (locked): 9
> 1. Confirm — lock this brief and advance to apply

**Recommendation: 1 — Confirm** — the brief covers all required slots and microcopy is final. Caveat: flip to 2 only if a string, state, or component is wrong; do not confirm strings you have not read.
@agent-directive: ui-apply-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Implementing the locked design brief.
> Microcopy is locked — every button label, empty-state message, and validation message must come verbatim from `state.ui_design.microcopy`.
> 1. Continue — implement the brief and write a `ui_apply` envelope back into state.ticket (rendered: {path: text}, files: [...])
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
@agent-directive: ui-design-review-plain
> Stack: `plain`. Reviewing rendered components against the locked design brief.
> The review pass compares `state.ticket.ui_apply.rendered` against `state.ui_design` (microcopy, states, a11y, layout) and produces a structured `findings` list.
> 1. Continue — run the review and write `{findings: [...], review_clean: bool}` into `state.ui_review`
> 2. Abort — drop this UI request
